task_completion.description: Open the Quality Control module in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP interface shows the Quality Control menu or analysis options.
The 'Variables Control Charts' analysis pane is open on the left side of the JASP window.

task_completion.description: Set the measurement variable and subgroup size
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis pane, a variable (ideally 'E1', but likely an alternative like 'Extraversion' due to dataset limitations) is placed in the 'Variables' box, and the 'Subgroup size' is explicitly set to 10.

task_completion.description: Generate and view the X-bar & R chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: An X-bar & R control chart is visible in the JASP results pane on the right.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project as qc_analysis.jasp
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window title shows 'qc_analysis.jasp', or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'qc_analysis.jasp' in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/.

task_completion.description: Create the qc_report.txt file with the control status
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file 'qc_report.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ containing the text 'Status: In Control' or 'Status: Out of Control'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application interface, not just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The chart is genuinely generated by JASP
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears within the JASP results pane, not as a standalone image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: The status in the report matches the generated chart
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'In Control' or 'Out of Control' status in the text file corresponds to whether any data points fall outside the control limits on the visible X-bar chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected JASP file is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/qc_analysis.jasp, the report is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/qc_report.txt, and the subgroup size is 10. Note: The dataset provided lacks the 'E1' column required by the task. The agent may fail to find 'E1' or attempt to use an alternative column (e.g., 'Extraversion'). Score the configuration and chart generation steps based on the agent's best attempt to fulfill the parameters given this limitation.
